caption: A man is seated at a table in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters, and a gold chain and watch. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring several gold stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A blue banner above him displays the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" alongside a red "BOSS TALK 101" logo. On the table, there is a black speaker and a white mug with the "BOSS TALK 101" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position with his hands clasped in front of him, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression. There is very little movement between the frames, as he maintains his posture and gaze.
